readiness_lanes: Health data quality and label audit
stop_conditions: no proposal language until eligibility and route owner are verified
patient data requires separate decision gate
no benchmark score or model rank claim without reviewed evidence
no endorsement adoption or course approval claim
no sandbox access or deployment readiness claim
no formal application or partner commitment without verified route
next_outward_action: if no route owner reply appears build one page hospital AI literacy collaboration packet
